svg.text: Canada 2025: FastF1 traces vs the oracle circuit line
Gray is the oracle GPS line. Color is a FastF1 lap projected with one clean RUS lap 63 transform.
VER lap 2, recovered to one clean
raw 5012.9 m -> 4415.1 m after seam trim
RUS lap 13, projected with clean-lap transform
shape fit: skipped because pit geometry is not representative
